description: Two card-endpoints, adjacent within-set, both equal nodes, both Sinnoh Poison/Dark skunk-line. Standard within-line evolution mirror — basic to terminal Stage-1 (level 34, no further evolutions). Size-and-mood inversion across the prints: daytime puffed-defensive Stunky to nighttime predatory-crouch Skuntank. Flavor-text shift tracks the design progression from rear-spray to belly-reservoir-tail-spray. Standard professional sigh. Mirror demanded.
citations: [Bulbapedia: Stunky (Pokemon) — National Pokedex no. 434, Poison/Dark, evolves to Skuntank at level 34]
[Bulbapedia: Skuntank (Pokemon) — National Pokedex no. 435, Poison/Dark, terminal stage]
[PokemonTCG.io API: swsh2-114 flavor_text — defensive rear-spray, 16-foot range]
[PokemonTCG.io API: swsh2-115 flavor_text — belly-reservoir tail-spray, diet-varied stench]
other_candidates_considered: No third-stage line completion exists — Skuntank is canonically terminal. Line cohort node not warranted at any future point unless additional cross-set Stunky/Skuntank prints land at N >= 3 corpus prints total, in which case the cohort node would anchor cross-print divergence not within-line evolution semantics.
